summary: Walked the full 動火 (hot_work) PTW: 判頭(60001005) created PTW-003 [sim-0611] (2座, today 13:00-17:00), saved a fully-checked hot_work version, added 2 workers, and submit_ptw froze the chain to [safety_officer -> main_contractor] / in_review. The v34 grant on mint_ptw_jwt is confirmed live (callable by 判頭; returns a valid HS256 JWT on the active permit with sane claims) and the v32 start_ptw_fire_watch RPC works + the 30-min close-out guard fires. KEY DEFECT: the project has zero safety_officer member and no admin/safety_officer test persona, so step-0 of the seeded default chain is UNSATISFIABLE — every legit signer (陳/王/李/判頭) is correctly denied, leaving the PTW permanently stuck. I only reached 'active' (to prove mint/QR) by a temporary, self-healed PM role flip; the chain is not satisfiable with the shipped fixtures.

bugs.title: Default PTW chain requires safety_officer but nothing guarantees a project has one — legit PTW gets permanently stuck at step 0
bugs.repro: 1) seed_default_chain (v10-split/6) auto-seeds every project's PTW chain as [step0 safety_officer, step1 main_contractor]. 2) Project cccc2026 has members pm/general_foreman/2x main_contractor/subcontractor and ZERO safety_officer (verified project_members). 3) As 判頭 create hot_work draft -> save version -> submit_ptw (status in_review, current_step 0). 4) submit_approval p_action_type=approve as EVERY available persona (main_contractor 陳, general_foreman 王, pm 李, subcontractor 判頭) -> all rejected P0001 '你冇權批准呢個步驟' because active_role_holders(project,'safety_officer') is empty. 5) No recovery path: PM insert of a safety_officer membership -> 42501 RLS; 王 self-apply as safety_officer -> 23505 unique(user_id,project_id) (one role per project); admin_override needs a global admin (none in fixtures). PTW is dead.
bugs.evidence: chain_snapshot=[{0,safety_officer},{1,main_contractor}]; project_members has 0 safety_officer; 4/4 approve attempts -> P0001 '你冇權批准呢個步驟'; PM membership insert -> 42501; 王 re-apply -> 23505 unique(user_id,project_id). Only after PM temporarily PATCHed 王's role to safety_officer did step0 advance (in_review->current_step 1) and step1 (陳 main_contractor) activate it (status active, expires_at 2026-06-11T15:59Z=23:59 HKT). So the chain is mechanically correct but unsatisfiable until a safety_officer member exists, and the client offers no UI to detect 'no eligible signer' or to assign safety_officer / edit the chain.

bugs.title: close_out for hot_work is unreachable in practice for non-admin creators (30-min wait, backdate is admin-only)
bugs.repro: As 判頭 on the active hot_work PTW: start_ptw_fire_watch (OK, sets fire_watch_started_at) then close_out_ptw immediately -> P0001 '30 分鐘火警監察未完成' (correct). The only fast-forward, backdate_ptw_fire_watch, is admin-only (v10-test). A site crew with no admin must literally wait 30 real minutes on-site — acceptable by design for safety, but flagged: there is no creator-visible countdown-to-closeable affordance beyond the live timer, and no graceful handling if the permit's same-day 23:59 expiry passes mid-fire-watch (it would flip to expired and close_out would then reject on status<>active).
bugs.evidence: start_ptw_fire_watch -> void OK (fire_watch_started_at=2026-06-10T22:33:39Z); close_out_ptw immediately -> P0001 '30 分鐘火警監察未完成'. backdate_ptw_fire_watch gated on global_role='admin'; no admin persona among 6000xxxx fixtures.

notes: PASSES: v34 mint_ptw_jwt grant LIVE — 判頭 (authenticated, non-creator-of-chain, just the permit creator) gets a real HS256 JWT on the active permit; decoded payload claims all correct {permit_id, project_id match; ptw_type hot_work; number PTW-003; iat=now; exp=2026-06-11 23:59 HKT = permit expires_at; exp>iat>now}. QR loop closed: verify_ptw_jwt as inspector 陳 returned payload and wrote a permit_scans audit row. v32 start_ptw_fire_watch works (old silent-no-op gone). Full chain mechanically works when a safety_officer exists (王 temp-promoted). Both-direction denials all correct (illegit approves -> 0/denied = PASS). Artifacts left: PTW-003 active hot_work [sim-0611], 2 workers [sim-0611], 2 signoffs, 1 scan, 1 approval per step. Cleanup: 王's membership role restored general_foreman; all member roles verified back to original; no project other than cccc2026 touched; no user_profiles created. Seeded PTW-2026-029/031/033 were force-seeded (chain_snapshot null, 0 approvals) so they never exercised the real chain — the unsatisfiability was hidden until a real submit. Recommend: seed_default_chain should fall back to a role that always has a holder (e.g. main_contractor/pm) OR project creation must enforce/prompt assigning a safety_officer, OR client must surface 'no eligible safety_officer — chain blocked' and provide admin override path.
